text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 
16 
ATRIAL_FIB 
LABEL: 
Atrial Fibrillation End-of-Year Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
atrial fibrillation as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: ATRIALFB 
LONG NAME: ATRIAL_FIB 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = Beneficiary did not meet
